title: BucketAccessControl
description: An access-control entry for a bucket.

kind.description: The kind of item this is.

id.description: The ID of the access-control entry.

selfLink.description: The link to this access-control entry.

entity.description: The entity holding the permission, in one of the following forms: user-userId, user-email, group-groupId, group-email, domain-domain, project-team-projectId, allUsers, or allAuthenticatedUsers.

role.description: The access permission for the entity.

email.description: The email address associated with the entity, if any.

domain.description: The domain associated with the entity, if any.

entityId.description: The ID for the entity, if any.

etag.description: HTTP 1.1 Entity tag for the access-control entry.

projectTeam.description: The project team associated with the entity, if any.
